tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Sacramento Kings vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights) 2026/03/24 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Coby White made six of Charlotte’s franchise-tying 26 3-pointers and finished with 27 points as the Hornets routed the Sacramento Kings 134-90 on Tuesday night for their fourth straight win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hornets tie franchise record with 26 3s, rout Kings 134-90
